$comment: Starter for scripted/manual instance creation. Copy to instances/<name>/d365fo-mcp.json and fill in the blanks — prefer `d365fo-mcp instance add` (interactive, asks only what your scenario needs) unless you're provisioning instances from a script. Every key, its default and the environment variable it maps to: docs/CONFIGURATION.md. Delete this key before use if you want a byte-for-byte match with what the wizard writes.
